Source URL: https://www.sbdc.uh.edu/sbdc/Prepare.asp

# Disaster Preparedness and Recovery Route to SBDC

## Reusable BOSS response pattern
For hurricane, flood, power outage, pandemic, or continuity issues, route to Disaster Preparedness resources, checklists, continuity/recovery webinars, and advising. Verify current disaster-loan or emergency resources live.

## Handoff fields to capture
- Stage
- Business idea/current business
- Location ZIP/county
- Primary decision
- What has been done
- Revenue/customer evidence
- Documents available
- Special eligibility or language preference
- Recommended resource and why
